subcodes.first_line: O attracted souls! For some time I have neither penned any letter nor delivered any address, and outwardly no seeds of fellowship have I sown [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس منجذبه چندی است که تحریری ننگاشتم و تقریری نداشتم و بظاهر تخم الفتی
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
